bird.name: Munchique wood wren
bird.summary: The Munchique wood wren (Henicorhina negreti) is a member of the wren family (Troglodytidae) that was described as new to science in 2003.…

locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Munchique wood wren
relations.evidence: It is found in the Western Andes of Colombia.{{cite journal |last1=Salaman |first1=Paul |last2=Coopmans |first2=Paul |last3=Donegan |first3=Thomas M

relations.subject: Munchique wood wren
relations.evidence: It inhabits very wet and stunted cloud forest, typically with many epiphytes, that is almost continuously in fog
